person.name: Jean de Brienne
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Sir John of Brienne (died c. 1296), was a French nobleman who served as Grand Butler of France in 1258.

«b»Biography«/b»
Jean was the youngest son of John of Brienne, Latin Emperor of Constantinople and Berengaria of León.

He held the office of Grand Butler of France in 1258 and later the Ambassador to Castile in 1275.

He died in circa 1296 and was buried at the Abbey of Maubuisson, France.

«b»Marriage and issue«/b»
John married firstly Jeanne, daughter of Geoffrey VI, Viscount of Châteaudun and Clemence de Roches. 

«b»They had:«/b»
1.) Blanche

He married secondly Marie, the widow of Alexander II of Scotland, the daughter of Enguerrand III, Lord of Coucy and Marie de Montmirel. They had no issue and later separated when she returned to Scotland to aid her family interests.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean de Brienne於1221年之後出生在دولتْ علیّه عثمانیّهالقُدس時，他的父親King John 'the Crusader' de Brienne I8831歲，母親Berenguela de León8795歲。他於大約1244年與Jeanne de Chateaudun在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易薩特a奧-度-洛易結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他於1275年在西班牙卡斯利被列為ambassador。他去世於1296年在法國哈帕格-亞登奧布布利恩勒-a奧，埋葬在法國阿奎泰吉洛德麥布頌。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean de Brienne was born after 1221, in Jerusalem, Ottoman Empire, his father, King John 'the Crusader' de Brienne I, was 8831 and his mother, Berenguela de León, was 8795. He married Jeanne de Chateaudun about 1244, in Château-du-Loir, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. In 1275, his occupation is listed as ambassador in Castile, Spain. He died in 1296, in Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France, and was buried in Maubuisson, Gironde, Aquitaine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean de Brienne est né après 1221, à Jerusalem, Empire ottoman, son père, King John 'the Crusader' de Brienne I, avait 8831 ans et sa mère, Berenguela de León, avait 8795 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne de Chateaudun environ 1244, à Château-du-Loir, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. En 1275, sa profession de son indiquée est ambassador à Castile, Espagne. Il est décédé en 1296, à Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France, et a été enterré à Maubuisson, Gironde, Aquitaine, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean de Brienne nach 1221 in Jerusalem, Osmanisches Reich geboren wurde, war sein Vater King John 'the Crusader' de Brienne I 8831 und seine Mutter Berenguela de León 8795. Er hat um 1244 in Château-du-Loir, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich Jeanne de Chateaudun geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. 1275 ist sein Beruf als ambassador in Castile, Spanien aufgeführt. Er starb 1296 in Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich und wurde in Maubuisson, Gironde, Aquitaine, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean de Brienne è nato il dopo il 1221 nel Jerusalem, Impero ottomano, il suo padre, King John 'the Crusader' de Brienne I, aveva 8831 anni e il suo madre, Berenguela de León, aveva 8795 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne de Chateaudun circa 1244, nel Château-du-Loir, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Nel 1275, la sua occupazione è indicata come ambassador nel Castile, Spagna. Morì nel 1296, nel Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, e fu sepolto a Maubuisson, Gironde, Aquitaine, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean de Brienneが1221年以後にオスマン帝国القُدسで生まれた時，父King John 'the Crusader' de Brienne Iは8831歳，母Berenguela de Leónは8795歳であった。約1244年にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーサルスチaテアウ-ドウ-ロイルでJeanne de Chateaudunと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。1275年，スペインカスティルでの職業はambassadorと記録されている。彼は1296年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアウベブリーネ-レ-チaテアウで死去し，フランスアクイティアインギロンドマウブイソンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean de Brienne(이)가 1221년 이후 دولتْ علیّه عثمانیّه القُدس에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 King John 'the Crusader' de Brienne I(은)는 8831세였고, 그의 어머니 Berenguela de León(은)는 8795세였다. 그는 대략 1244년 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테 cha테오-드-로이르에서 Jeanne de Chateaudun(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1275년, 그의 직업은 스페인 카스틸에서 ambassador이었다. 그는 1296년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 오브 브리니-레-cha테오에서 사망했으며 프랑스 아키테인 지론드 모버이슨에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean de Brienne nasceu após 1221, em Jerusalem, Império Otomano, seu pai, King John 'the Crusader' de Brienne I, tinha 8831 anos e sua mãe, Berenguela de León, tinha 8795 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne de Chateaudun aproximadamente 1244, em Château-du-Loir, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Em 1275, sua profissão aparece como ambassador em Castile, Espanha. Ele faleceu em 1296, em Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, França, e foi sepultado em Maubuisson, Gironde, Aquitaine, França.

ru.Château-du-Loir, Sarthe, Pays de la Loir: чaто-ду-лоир, сарт, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.Couptrain, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Fr: коуптреин, меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.Chateau Du Loir, Sarthe, Maine Pays De L: чaто-ду-лоир, сарт, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean de Brienne родился после 1221 г. в местности القُدس, Османская империя, его отцу по имени King John 'the Crusader' de Brienne I было 8831 год, а матери, которую звали Berenguela de León, 8795. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne de Chateaudun около 1244 г. в местности чaто-ду-лоир, сарт, пеис де ла лоир, Франция. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. В 1275 году он работал по профессии ambassador в местности кастиль, Испания. Он умер в 1296 г. в местности бриенне-ле-чaто, ауб, чампагне-арденн, Франция и был похоронен в местности маубуиссон, гиронд, аквитеин, Франция.

es.Chateau Du Loir, Sarthe, Maine Pays De L: Château-du-Loir, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Francia
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean de Brienne nació después de 1221, en Jerusalem, Imperio otomano, su papá, King John 'the Crusader' de Brienne I, tenía 8831 años y su mamá, Berenguela de León, tenía 8795 años. Se casó con Jeanne de Chateaudun aproximadamente 1244, en Château-du-Loir, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. En 1275, su ocupación registrada era ambassador en Castile, España. Murió en 1296, en Brienne-le-Château, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, y fue sepultado en Maubuisson, Gironde, Aquitaine, Francia.
